prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Receptacles & switches, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: open ground. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 406.4, 406.9.
title: Identification: Receptacles & switches (residential job)
